hero.title: Transform your body with education, movement, and real support
hero.description: The FiiFit online program combines video lessons, personalized workouts, and a community that supports you. Lasting changes in a reasonable timeframe.

problems.title: The problems FiiFit solves
problems.problem1_desc: Extreme restrictions don't work. We teach you to eat healthy without giving up good food.
problems.problem2_desc: Don't know what exercises to do? Follow our plans designed for real results.
problems.problem3_desc: You won't go far alone. The FiiFit community supports you every day.
problems.problem4_desc: Tired of the lose-gain cycle. We teach lasting lifestyle changes.
problems.problem5_desc: Personal training and nutrition don't have to cost a fortune. Access for everyone.
problems.problem6_desc: 15-minute lessons. Workouts that fit your busy life.

about.title: How FiiFit works
about.feature1_desc: 24 lessons about nutrition, psychology and habits. Each 10-15 minutes, on your phone.
about.feature2_desc: Plans adapted to your fitness level. No equipment, no gym needed.
about.feature3_desc: Take a photo of your meal. AI detects foods and calculates calories. Simple and fast.
about.feature4_desc: Members who support you. Daily accountability and motivation from people like you.
about.feature5_desc: 30 videos with progressive exercises. Follow along with fitness expert.

expert.title: Created by a fitness and nutrition expert
expert.description: FiiFit founder is a personal trainer with 8+ years of experience and international certifications. With thousands of real transformations.

lessons.title: 24 Lessons that change perspective
lessons.description: Each lesson teaches you something you can apply today. From nutrition to habits and mindset.

macro_tracker.title: AI Calorie & Macro Tracker
macro_tracker.description: Write what you ate or upload a meal photo. AI detects foods and estimates portions, then calories and macros are calculated from USDA or Open Food Facts matches.
macro_tracker.example: for example: 2 eggs, 100g rice, 150g chicken breast and a banana

pricing.title: Affordable for everyone
pricing.description: Every plan includes access to all lessons, workouts, macro tracker and community.

faq.title: What questions do you have?
faq.a1: If you struggle with weight, confidence, lack of motivation, or don't know how to start - yes. This is for you.
faq.a2: You get 30 videos with progressive exercises. You can follow them at home, without equipment.
faq.q3: Do I need to go to the gym?
faq.a3: No. All exercises can be done at home with your body and a resistance band (optional).
faq.a4: Right after registration. You can start with the first lesson and first workout.
faq.a5: It depends on you. If you follow the plan, results will come. No shortcuts, no false promises.
faq.q6: What if I don't like it?
faq.a6: Full refund in the first 7 days, no questions asked.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.description: The first steps are the hardest. But not alone.

footer.tagline: Online weight loss program with education, exercise and real support.
footer.mission: So every woman feels comfortable and strong in her own body.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.terms: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

account.title: My account
account.no_plan: You don't have an active plan
account.choose_plan: Choose a subscription to unlock lessons, tracker and personalized plan.
account.week_plan_desc: A simple guide for workouts, meals, tracker and keeping pace.
account.week_plan_no_subscription: The weekly plan appears here after activating a subscription.
